message.thinking:
We need produce JSON array of 3 objects, each corresponds to question 1,2,3. Must include keys "question", "feedback", "complies". "question" value is one word: Chapters/Description/Structure depending on which question. So for Q1: "Chapters". For Q2: "Description". For Q3: "Structure". Provide feedback and compliance boolean.

We must evaluate the provided text: "Bakalaura darbs sastāv no 3 daļām: 
1.	Nodaļa ir veltīta teorētiskajam apkopojumam par trie un hešēšanas datu struktūrām
2.	Nodaļā izvirzīta metodika datu struktūru salīdzināšanai, un tai atbilstoši veikts eksperiments
3.	Nodaļa tiek pārbaudīti iegūtie rezultāti"

Check each question:

1. Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? It lists 3 sections. So yes, it lists them. So compliance true.

But maybe question expects main sections: yes it lists. Provide feedback: "The text enumerates three sections and gives their titles, which satisfies listing the main sections." Provide that.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It says: 1. Nodaļa ir veltīta teorētiskajam apkopojumam par trie un hešēšanas datu struktūrām – brief description. 2. Nodaļā izvirzīta metodika datu struktūru salīdzināšanai, un tai atbilstoši veikts eksperiments – describes method. 3. Nodaļa tiek pārbaudīti iegūtie rezultāti – results. That's a brief description. So compliance true.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure just from this text? Yes, the enumerated list shows the structure. So compliance true.

Thus all three comply. Provide feedback highlighting strengths.

We must output array with 3 objects. Ensure JSON formatting correct. No extra text.
